analysis.consistency: The feature aligns with the established progression of Monk class features, appearing at level 15.
analysis.quality: The description is clear and directly references established game terms (ki, aging, food/water). The mechanical effects are straightforward and significant for long-term play.

mechanics.primary_effect: Immunity to non-magical aging and magical aging effects.
mechanics.secondary_effect: No longer requires food or water.
mechanics.caveat: Can still die of old age (implying they will eventually reach the maximum age limit, but the process is halted/prevented until that point).

analysis.improvement_suggestions: None needed; the feature is well-defined as per standard rules.
